name: Recycled Glass Soap Dish Clear - Threshold™
description:
Keep a bar of soap within easy reach with the charming Recycled Glass Soap Dish from Threshold™. This soap dish is made from 100% recycled glass and features a nonslip design so your soap stays put, while the beautiful green tint adds a dash of soft color to your decor. It's perfect for preventing slippery, soapy messes from forming on your countertops, and it can be hand washed as needed for easy cleaning.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
